title: vaccinium laxum
intro: Vaccinium laxum is a type of dwarf blueberry plant native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium laxum include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. Vaccinium laxum is typically harvested for its leaves and berries, which are then used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
